description: Three watermain break reports on Bathurst St within one hour, Oct 2 2024. 511 streetcar disrupted. Three departments had pieces — nobody coordinated.

events.address: Bathurst St & Prue Ave, Toronto, ON
Bathurst St from Prue Ave to Glencairn Ave

phases.label: 311 Call — Watermain Break
phases.description: Resident calls 311: watermain break on Bathurst St. StreetSense fires a proactive prediction immediately — before Transportation Services or TTC know anything.

phases.label: Road Restriction Posted
phases.description: Transportation Services posts emergency road closure on Bathurst St. A 2-event cluster forms. StreetSense's earlier prediction is partially confirmed.

phases.label: TTC Alert Issued — Cascade Confirmed
phases.description: TTC issues 511 Bathurst diversion alert. Full watermain→road→TTC cascade confirmed. StreetSense brief generated — predicted this 32 minutes ago.
